items.title: SSO deal-loss validation
items.summary: Interview Tafadzwa, Isma'eel, Michelle; confirm whether SSO was a real loss driver; review full lost-deal Excel. **Complete before April discovery workshops (wk 2–3).** Source: 2026-03-30 Post-Launch Priorities.

items.title: April discovery workshops
items.summary: Organise with Tanya for **wk 2–3 April** (SSO, elevated auth, WhatsApp, AI, Explorer, page builder). Align invites, agenda, pre-reads.

items.title: Essential — GTM foundation
items.summary: One-pager (problem, buyer, outcome, proof); align marketing + sales on Essential vs future tiers + ICP; outline deck/web narrative before GA.
items.nextAction: Draft one-pager skeleton, then schedule alignment with marketing + sales.

items.title: Essential — stakeholder RACI
items.summary: Populate stakeholder table on launch doc with wiki links to Internal (and External) people pages.
items.nextAction: Map Steerco + workstream leads into RACI rows.

items.title: Essential launch — migration execution
items.summary: Owners per cohort, cutover criteria, steering cadence — aligned to migration roadmap and end-May kickoff.
items.nextAction: Name owner per Q2 pilot account; confirm steering forum.

items.title: Scheduling — simplest implementation
items.summary: Cron-based posts/messages first; input for April discovery workshops.

items.title: Workboard — expand dashboard (review + plan)
items.summary: **Start 2026-04-09+:** New tab(s) for **competitor analysis** + **market insights** (fed from vault / Market_intelligence); **connect to Bitbucket** (builds on [[^task-20260325-001]]); **automation / orchestration** (Kanban triggers, optional CI hooks).

items.title: (Anneke) WhatsApp one-way pricing
items.summary: Applicability for message module; cross-check with Merel briefing / Meta 2026 model. *Coordination / PM follow-up.*

items.title: (Tanya) Importer + demo users
items.summary: Confirm importer works; demo users importable for grouping (demo environment).

items.title: Dependency: Jan — WhatsApp Flow + Flow Gear
items.summary: Feasibility + technical requirements; mid-April demo target. *Track / unblock.*

items.summary: Export/sync so pipeline/deals file lands in repo when it changes; define folder, naming, and how you use it for planning.
items.nextAction: Pick vault folder + filename; verify PowerFlow trigger.

items.title: Calendar — O365 via Apple Calendar (Dex)
items.summary: Confirm work calendar syncs to Calendar.app; run /calendar-setup for fast local daily-plan queries.
items.nextAction: If calendar visible in Calendar.app, run calendar-setup script from dex-obsidian/calendar skill.

items.title: Essential launch — Dependencies
items.summary: Fill Dependencies section on launch doc with named owners: Eng, Design, Legal, CS, integrations.
items.nextAction: Ping each function for one line + ticket link per dependency.

items.title: Essential launch — ICPs
items.summary: Add ideal customer profiles to launch narrative and GTM.
items.nextAction: List 2–3 ICP segments with pains, buying triggers, and anti-ICP.

items.title: Essential — PRD/AC catch-up
items.summary: Fold federated remote app (Air) / PDF payslip path and WhatsApp into formal PRD + acceptance criteria where missing.
items.nextAction: Gap-review PRD index vs launch scope; open AC updates per PRD.

items.title: Elevated auth — follow-through
items.summary: Workshop core vs remote app split and validation; Tanya docs → Pieter review per elevated auth meeting.
items.nextAction: Schedule workshop; track doc handoff to Pieter.

items.title: Wyzetalk Essential — scope narrative
items.summary: Elevator pitch, GA window, migration kickoff, full Requirements scope — captured on launch doc.

items.title: PRDs in vault
items.summary: Requirements tree maintained under 06-Resources/PRDs/.

items.title: (Leon) Floatpays discovery workshops
items.summary: Organise/run discovery with Floatpays team (EWA integration, revenue share); post–April leave per roadmap.

items.title: (Michelle) Remote app extensions — next slice
items.summary: Define + prioritise payslips, leave, roster (remote apps + Blue handoff).

items.title: Bitbucket + MCP for Copilot
items.summary: Connect Bitbucket to the dev workflow; evaluate or stand up an **MCP server** so Copilot (and Dex) can reason over repos, PRs, and code context.

items.title: Meeting transcripts pipeline
items.summary: Unified path for **all meeting-note transcripts** (sources, storage, and how Dex/Copilot consume them — e.g. vault ingest, MCP, Teams exports). Define scope and tooling.

items.title: Essential — success metrics + review
items.summary: Define adoption, activation, support-load metrics and a review date.

items.title: BDD mutation testing
items.summary: Introduce or standardise **BDD / mutation testing** in the PDLC (tooling, where it runs, ownership).

items.title: PRDs — HR self-service suite
items.summary: Write PRDs for payslips (PDF + data-structured), leave balances, work schedules/rosters, HR employee details, and vacancies/internal job board. ICP table-stakes with zero current specs.

items.title: Pre-GA — internal build readiness
items.summary: Align build complete (internal) with GA window; track blockers vs milestones.

items.title: PRDs — USSD + WhatsApp channels
items.summary: Formal specs for USSD access path (feature-phone users, mining/energy) and WhatsApp channel integration. Both in ICP; WhatsApp is deal-critical (JEM losses).

items.title: GTM assets — web + deck
items.summary: Customer-facing narrative assets for GA milestone (complements one-pager / alignment).

items.title: PRDs — Operational dashboards + Recognition suite
items.summary: Specs for safety dashboards, production dashboards, leaderboards, badges, birthdays, long service. Core ICP use cases with no current PRDs.

items.title: Migration roadmap — validate € MRR
items.summary: Cross-check est. platform MRR in launch doc with finance and account owners.

items.title: GTM — Safety-led positioning reframe
items.summary: Rewrite GTM narrative from "employee app" to "operational compliance backbone for regulated frontline industries." Update one-pager, deck, and web language.

items.title: Sales enablement — coexistence story
items.summary: Document "Essential + Teams/SharePoint/Workplace" integration narrative. Position as the layer those platforms can't reach (USSD, offline, safety, ops) — not a replacement.

items.title: Beta accounts — confirm before outreach
items.summary: G4S / Anglo noted as potential only — confirm before GTM or migration touch.

items.title: ICP enforcement — disqualification criteria
items.summary: Define hard disqualification rules (<2,000 employees; no deskless majority; no safety/compliance driver; outside primary verticals) and add to sales qualification process.

items.title: Competitive battle cards — JEM, Staffbase, Beekeeper
items.summary: One-page "Why Wyzetalk vs X" for the three most common competitive situations, anchored on regulated-industry depth, SA proof, and USSD/data-light access.
